recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A widower and two of his sons become infatuated by their beautiful housekeeper, and all three set out to seduce her using their own unique methods.

recommendations.title: Houseboat
recommendations.overview: An Italian socialite on the run signs on as housekeeper for a widower with three children.

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her han

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Not Cool
recommendations.overview: Former prom king Scott returns home for Thanksgiving break and gets dumped by his long-term girlfriend. With his world turned upside down, Scott strikes an unlikely friendship with former classmate Tori, an ugly duckling who blossomed in her first se

recommendations.title: The Santa Clause
recommendations.overview: On Christmas Eve, divorced dad Scott Calvin and his son discover Santa Claus has fallen off their roof. When Scott takes the reins of the magical sleigh, he finds he is now the new Santa, and must convince a world of disbelievers, including himself.

recommendations.title: Teen Wolf: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The wolves are howling once again, as a terrifying ancient evil emerges in Beacon Hills. Scott McCall, no longer a teenager yet still an Alpha, must gather new allies and reunite trusted friends to fight back against this powerful and deadly enemy.

recommendations.title: The Truth About Love Is...
recommendations.overview: Dora, raises her two children with the help of her eccentric family, free-spirited best friend, and a charming poet-turned- nanny.
